home.tagline: Ask nature. Build with your hands.
home.description: Your child solves one real problem every week — with design thinking, nature's secrets, and home materials. Ages 8+.
home.badges: ✓ No ads · ✓ Private by default · ✓ Cancel anytime · ✓ COPPA-friendly

hero.headline: Ask nature. Build with your hands.
hero.subhead: Your child solves one real problem every week — with design thinking, nature's secrets, and home materials. Ages 8+.
hero.trust: No credit card needed · Cancel anytime · COPPA-friendly

year_preview.heading: What a year of Idea Pop looks like

cycle.heading: How it works — the creative cycle
cycle.see_desc: Watch a short nature documentary clip
cycle.learn_desc: Follow an expert maker in the Library
cycle.solve_desc: Complete a real challenge with home materials

together.heading: We can make them together
together.body: See what your child creates, approve weekly missions, and celebrate every build — from wherever you are.

curriculum.heading: A curriculum, not random videos
curriculum.body: Every week connects to the next. Biomimicry, forces, camouflage, bridges — topics that build on each other.

try_now.heading: Try one mission right now
try_now.body: No account needed. Pick an open mission and start building.

experts.heading: Real experts, exciting lessons
experts.subhead: Every library course is led by someone who does this for a living.

pricing_teaser.heading: Start free. Upgrade when your kids enjoy it.

items.q: How is this different from YouTube?
items.a: Every video is one piece of a structured weekly challenge. Kids watch, learn from an expert, then solve a real problem with home materials — YouTube is open-ended; Idea Pop is purposeful.

items.q: What age is Idea Pop for?
items.a: Ages 8 to 14. The missions scale in complexity, so an 8-year-old and a 12-year-old can both be challenged appropriately.
Yes. No ads, no social feeds, no free chat. All AI outputs are labeled. We're COPPA-friendly and kids never share with strangers.

items.q: Can my child use it independently?
items.a: Mostly, yes. You approve missions and see the portfolio. Your child builds and submits — you stay informed without hovering.

items.q: What if we want to cancel?
items.a: One click, any time. You keep access until the end of your billing period. No questions asked.

penguin_helper.heading: Hi, I'm Idea Pop!
penguin_helper.body: I help kids find their next mission, look up nature facts, and celebrate every build. Tap me anytime.

hero.heading: The Idea Pop Method
hero.subhead: A structured creative curriculum built on biomimicry and maker education.

why.heading: Why we built it
why.body: Screen time is here to stay. We built Idea Pop so kids use it to solve, build, and think — not just consume. Every minute on Idea Pop ends with something made.

cycle.heading: One cycle, every week
cycle.body: SEE a nature clip → LEARN from an expert → SOLVE with home materials. Same rhythm, new topic, every week.

what_you_see.heading: What you'll actually see
items: A weekly mission email with what to gather at home
A 3–5 min nature clip your child watches first
An expert walkthrough in the Library
A build challenge with photo submission
XP, badges, and a growing Ideas Wall portfolio

hero.heading: Free for teachers — forever
hero.subhead: Bring the creative cycle into your classroom. No budget required.

class_code.heading: Your class code, your control
class_code.body: Create a class, share a code, and every student joins with a safe account. You see their portfolio — they never see each other's.

parent_letter.heading: Printable parent letter
parent_letter.body: One page that explains Idea Pop, data practices, and how parents can follow along at home.

privacy.heading: Privacy-first for students
items: No social feeds or peer chat

cta.heading: Ready to bring Idea Pop to your class?

pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subhead: Start free. Upgrade when your family loves it.
pricing.kid_note: Kids can browse plans. Checkout is completed by a parent.
pricing.school_body: Volume pricing and FERPA DPA available.

faqs.q: When does my free trial start?
faqs.a: The moment you click Start free trial. You have 14 days to try everything — no credit card needed.

faqs.q: What happens when the trial ends?
faqs.a: You drop to the Free plan automatically. No charge, no surprise.

faqs.q: Can I switch between monthly and annual?
faqs.a: Yes — any time from your account settings. Switching to annual credits the remaining monthly days.
One account supports one child. Multi-child family plans are on the roadmap.

explore.heading: Animal Superpowers
explore.subheading: Organised by superpower, not species — because that's how real engineers think.

library.heading: Bored? Let's make something!
library.subheading: Pick a studio, grab simple materials, and make something uniquely yours.

persona_select.heading: Tell us who you are
persona_select.subhead: So we can make this great for you
persona_select.teacher_sub: I use this in the classroom

login.heading: Welcome back
login.error_invalid: Wrong email or password. Please try again.
login.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verify_email.heading: Check your inbox
verify_email.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
verify_email.success_body: Your account is ready. Let's get started.

kid.step_avatar_sub: Who's going on the adventure with you?
kid.step_nickname_sub: Pick a nickname — no real name needed.
kid.step_birth_year_sub: We use this to show missions that match your age.
kid.step_parent_email_sub: We'll send them a link to finish your account. They need to say "yes" before you can share your builds.
kid.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

parent.heading: Welcome to Idea Pop!
parent.subhead: Your account is ready. You can manage your child's missions and see their portfolio here.

teacher.heading: Create your first class
teacher.subhead: Students join with this class code — no email or password needed.
teacher.class_code_body: Share this with your students. They enter it when they sign up.
teacher.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

consent.heading: Unlock {nickname}'s account
consent.body: By tapping below you confirm you're {nickname}'s parent or guardian and agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms.
consent.success_body: They can now share builds and use all features.
consent.error_invalid: This link is expired or already used.
consent.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
